changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.title = 'Data Analysis & Export'

changeSet.comment: Ensure Data Analysis page has page_order = 9

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND title = 'Data Analysis & Export'

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.title = 'Reporting & REDCap Integration'

changeSet.comment: Ensure Reporting & REDCap Integration page has page_order = 10

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND title = 'Reporting & REDCap Integration'

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'MNTD' AND name = 'Data Analysis & Export'

changeSet.comment: Ensure Data Analysis workflow template has display_order = 9

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'MNTD' AND name = 'Reporting & REDCap Integration'

changeSet.comment: Ensure Reporting workflow template has display_order = 10
